name: Cossistant Open Source Program
description: Free Cossistant Pro plan for open source projects, including credits, a dofollow listing, guest blog posts, and integration support.

perks.title: Free Pro Plan
perks.description: Pro plan for free with included credits.

perks.title: Listing with Dofollow Link
perks.description: Your project listed on the Cossistant OSS page with a dofollow backlink.

perks.title: Guest Blog Post
perks.description: A guest blog post published on the Cossistant blog.

perks.title: Integration Support
perks.description: Help integrating and customizing the Cossistant widget by the Cossistant team.

requirements: Keep Cossistant mentioned in the widget.
Add the OSS badge to your README.md.
Keep the badge linked to the Cossistant OSS program page.
applicationProcess: Apply through the Cossistant OSS friends program page.
